items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 110.2 mph at a -4.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the Detroit Tigers, KC 5, DET 1. Michael Wacha led the night, working 7.0 innings with 0 earned runs, 6 strikeouts and 2 walks. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 110.2 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Tigers Recap
